info.description: API for managing accounts, contacts, bills, invoices, and transactions.
info.title: Portal API

get.description: Get a list of all bank accounts, cash, and credit cards with current balances.

post.description: Create a new bank account, cash or credit card.

get.description: Get details and current balance of a specific account.

put.description: Update details of an existing account.

post.description: Authenticates with the Nexus gateway using email and password. Returns a JWT token.
Provisions a tenant via the Nexus gateway and initialises the portal schema. Requires NEXUS_CONTROL_URL and ADMIN_API_KEY to be configured.

get.description: Get a list of all payable bills, with current status and allocation info.

parameters.description: Search by bill number, notes, or vendor name
parameters.name: search

get.description: Get details and allocation status of a specific bill.

put.description: Update details of an existing bill.

get.description: Get all line items for a specific bill.

post.description: Add a new line item to an existing bill.

put.description: Update an existing line item in a bill.

delete.description: Remove a line item from a bill.

get.description: Get all payment transactions linked to a specific bill.
Returns a ranked list of unallocated bank transactions that could match a bill, scored by amount, date, and description similarity. Already-linked transactions are excluded.
Get a list of all vendors and customers with financial summaries.

parameters.description: Search by name, email, or phone
parameters.name: search

post.description: Create a new vendor or customer.

get.description: Get details and financial summary of a specific contact.

put.description: Update details of an existing contact.

get.description: Get totals for accounts, contacts, bills, invoices, and recent transactions.
Get a list of all receivable invoices, with current status and allocation info.

parameters.description: Search by invoice number, notes, or customer name
parameters.name: search

get.description: Get details and allocation status of a specific invoice.

put.description: Update details of an existing invoice.

get.description: Get all line items for a specific invoice.

post.description: Add a new line item to an existing invoice.

put.description: Update an existing line item in an invoice.

delete.description: Remove a line item from an invoice.

get.description: Get all payment transactions linked to a specific invoice.
Returns a ranked list of unallocated bank transactions that could match an invoice, scored by amount, date, and description similarity. Already-linked transactions are excluded.
Get a list of all platform payouts (Swiggy, Zomato, Swiggy-Dineout).

post.description: Create a new platform payout record.

get.description: Get details of a specific platform payout.

put.description: Update details of an existing platform payout record.

get.description: Get all payment transactions linked to a specific payout.
Returns a ranked list of unallocated bank transactions that could match a payout, scored by amount, date, and UTR/description similarity. Already-linked transactions are excluded.
Get a list of all scheduled recurring payments (income or expense).

parameters.description: Filter by status (active, paused, cancelled, completed)
parameters.name: status

post.description: Create a new scheduled recurring payment.

get.description: Get details of a specific recurring payment.

put.description: Update details of an existing recurring payment.

get.description: Get all payment transactions linked to a specific recurring payment, including the due date and status of the occurrence each transaction covers.

Returns a ranked list of bank transactions that could correspond to a recurring payment occurrence, scored by amount (±2% tolerance), date proximity to next_due_date, and description/reference similarity. Excludes transactions already linked to this recurring payment.
get.summary: Suggest transactions for a recurring payment

get.description: Returns all scheduled occurrences (instances) for a recurring payment. Occurrences are auto-generated by the server for each due date up to today. Each occurrence tracks whether it has been paid via a linked bank transaction.
Get a list of all bank transactions (income, expense, transfer) with allocation info.

post.description: Create a new bank transaction (income, expense, or transfer).

get.description: Get details and allocation status of a specific transaction.

put.description: Update details of an existing transaction.

post.description: Finds the best matching bill, invoice, or payout for a bank statement entry and automatically creates a transaction link when confidence is at least 0.7. Returns the created link on success, or the top suggestion without linking when confidence is below the threshold.
post.summary: Auto-match a transaction to a document

get.description: Get all bills and invoices linked (paid) by this transaction.

post.description: Allocate an amount from a transaction to a specific bill or invoice.

delete.description: Deallocate an amount from a transaction to a bill or invoice.

get.description: Returns a ranked list of bills, invoices, payouts, and recurring payments that could match a bank statement entry, scored by amount, date, and description similarity. Expense transactions match against bills; income transactions match against invoices and payouts. Recurring payments are suggested for both types as informational matches (linkable=false).
get.summary: Suggest document matches for a transaction

linkable.description: whether this suggestion can be auto-linked
